title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running large language models locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API, published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama API, available on PyPI as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models as LLM or embeddings in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (now Open WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama with chat history, model management, RAG and plugin system.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama published to Maven Central; supports chat, embed, pull, list, etc.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Community-built interactive CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API for quick prompting and model ops.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local AI code completion via Ollama models.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama with async I/O and native structs for API responses.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that lets you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET client for Ollama, published as NuGet package ‘Ollama’.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed, async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU and persistence support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of ready-to-run Docker Compose stacks for Ollama + Open WebUI, NVIDIA, RAG, etc.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: Lightweight VS Code extension to chat with any Ollama model inside the editor sidebar.

title: ollama-keras
summary: Keras / TensorFlow addon that exposes Ollama models as custom Keras layers for quick fine-tune experiments.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: End-to-end RAG chatbot template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + FastAPI + React.

title: ollama-tool-calling
summary: Experimental repo demonstrating function-calling patterns with Ollama models via constrained JSON generation.
